Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril's Restaurant in New Orleans recipes.
Video.title: Emeril's Restaurant Classics

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril shows you how versatile phyllo dough is as he makes both sweet and savory dishes.
Video.title: The Magic of Phyllo

Video.summary: Add Italian flair to your next dinner with Emeril's favorites.
Video.title: Italian Favorites

Video.summary: Emeril prepares oysters and mussels, including oysters on the half shell with three sauces. Plus, Emeril's classic Moules mariniere with pommes frites
Video.title: Bivalves: Oysters and Mussels

Video.summary: E.J. and Meril join dad Emeril to make some of their favorite recipes.
Video.title: Cooking with Your Kids

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Crawfish Egg Rolls with Hot Sesame Drizzle, Crawfish Imperial, Crawfish Burgers, Fried Crawfish Tails with Olive Salad
Video.title: Crawfish Season

Video.summary: For your next get together, host a dinner the New Orleans way!
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: If you're searching for a satisfying, no-fuss dinner, look no further than Emeril's one-pot wonders.
Video.title: One-Pot Wonders

Video.summary: Gumbo Z'Herbes, Turkey Gumbo
Video.title: Gumbo Show

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Cali-style carne asada burritos, and crowd-pleasing chicken and green chile nachos.
Video.title: Los Angeles Rams

Video.summary: Hot Cross Buns, Crown Roast of Lamb, Ring of Carrot with Buttered Peas, Mini Bundt Cakes with Peanut Butter Filling and Chocolate Glaze
Video.title: Easter Dinner

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: Tailgate Houston-style: grilled jalapeno poppers, chili con queso, and ancho-rubbed flap steak.
Video.title: Houston Texans

Video.summary: Emeril prepares satisfying soups: Cuban black bean soup, tortilla soup, and French onion soup topped with bubbling Gruyere cheese
Video.title: International Soups

Video.summary: Lemon Squares; Kicked-Up Oatmeal Cookies; Blueberry Raspberry Muffins; Snickerdoodles; Chocolate Swirl Bundt Cake
Video.title: We're Havin' a Bake Sale

Video.summary: Charlotte's Boursin Roasted Chicken; Chicken Cakes with Tangy Remoulade Sauce; Filipino "Adobo-Style" Chicken Thighs; Chicken Pontalba
Video.title: Chicken Four Ways

Video.summary: Caribbean beans, sweet potato pie and Haitian treats.
Video.title: New Orleans Caribbean Connection

Video.summary: Egg and Lobster Salad with Homemade Tarragon Mayonnaise; Eggs Sardou; Smoked Salmon Scrambled Egg Packages with Lemon Creme Fraiche; Rum Creme Caramel
Video.title: Egg-cellent Eggs

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Janie Glade create an economical meal that makes use of pantry staples.
Video.title: with Janie Glade

Video.summary: Emeril and dairy farm owner Sarah Roland create dishes using buffalo mozzarella.
Video.title: with Sarah Roland

Video.summary: For your next get together, try grilling squab instead of chicken.
Video.title: Bringing Back Squab

Video.summary: The best strawberries come from Louisiana, and here are some of Emeril's favorite berry recipes.
Video.title: Strawberry Festival

Video.summary: Winter Squash Chowder, Butternut Squash Spaetzle
Video.title: Squash

Video.summary: Lobster Gazpacho, Fruit Minestrone
Video.title: Cold Soup

Video.summary: Rhubarb and Foie Gras, Chicken Smothered in Rhubarb, Rhubarb Cobbler with Vanilla Ice Cream
Video.title: Cooking with Rhubarb

Video.summary: Dallas Cowboys superfan Jesse Prado creates Tex-Mex barbecue with a Louisiana kick.
Video.title: Dallas

Video.summary: Atlanta Falcons superfan Thomas Dunn draws from his city's Southern delicacies.
Video.title: Atlanta

Video.summary: Making ribeyes on the grill, spinach, baked potatoes, and four cheese mac in honor of Sin City.
Video.title: Las Vegas

Video.summary: Honoring Wisconsin, the cheese capital of the US, by making cheesy beer dips and soft pretzels.
Video.title: Green Bay
